title: lastrea quadriaurita
intro: Lastrea quadriaurita, also known as Quadriaurita fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lastrea quadriaurita include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and infusions made into topical creams or ointments.
